title: Better Vanilla+
description: Light Weight Vanilla like mod pack
body:
# Better Vanilla+ **A refined vanilla experience with subtle enhancements, performance boosts, and quality-of-life tweaks—all while keeping Minecraft’s core charm intact.** ### Features ✔ Smoother Performance – Optimized FPS and reduced lag. ✔ Visual Polish – Subtle shaders, animations, and lighting tweaks. ✔ Gameplay Tweaks – Convenient inventory, farming, and UI improvements. ✔ 100% Vanilla-Friendly – No drastic changes; perfect for survival purists.
📜Mods List (Click to Expand) ### Core & Performance - FerriteCore – Reduces RAM usage. - Rubidium – Sodium port for Forge (FPS boost). - Entity Culling – Optimizes rendering. - Clumps – Merges XP orbs for less lag. ### Visual & Immersion - Sound Physics Remastered - More Realistic Sounds - Dynamic Lights – Real-time light from held torches. - Falling Leaves – Animated leaf particles. - 3D Skin Layers – Better player model depth. - Complementary Shaders – Soft lighting enhancements. ### Quality of Life - AppleSkin – Shows hunger/saturation values. - Controlling – Searchable keybind menu. - RightClickHarvest – Farm crops faster. - Easy Shulker Boxes – Open shulkers in your inventory. ### World & Exploration - Biomes O’ Plenty – Expands vanilla biomes (optional, disable if preferred). - Dungeons and Taverns – Adds subtle structures. - Towns and Towers – Mini ruins and landmarks. ### UI & Interface - Better F3 - More user friendlier F3 - FancyMenu – Customizable main menu. - Detail Armor Bar – Sleeker armor durability display. - Pick Up Notifier – Alerts for collected items.
